utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully detailed: property specifies type, location, price, currency, features, condo fees, and taxes; financing lists method and loan requirement; legal_services includes package name, cost, currency, and included features; moving_services includes service level, cost, currency, features, and timeline flexibility; setup_services includes package type, cost, currency, included services, and setup timeline; total_budget includes a full breakdown with amounts and currency. All are fully specified according to the format.
